黒バック背景
A series of terrible events following an unexpected notification. Mai
became a sacrifice, and her own first time was forcibly taken away.
Just when things couldn't get any worse, Mai was kidnapped by the
principal. And in order to rescue her, I was challenged to conquer the
location instructed by the principal and ultimately make it to my own
place.
It's quite troublesome, but since Mai has been taken hostage, there is
no choice but to accept and reluctantly start the battle. Will Rio be
able to reach the principal's location safely and rescue Mai?
The battle for that purpose begins now!
オープニングとか？
さすがに時間的にプロロと同じ時間軸はないかな。
